statement: Evidence-based review found stronger support for lasers, platelet-rich plasma, chemical peels, hyaluronic acid fillers and microneedling, and lesser-quality evidence for microdermabrasion, subcision and lipoaspirate grafting in atrophic acne scars.
source_title: Evidence-based management of cutaneous scarring in dermatology part 2: atrophic acne scarring.
